templates.title: Contract-first engine feature
templates.purpose: Define deterministic contracts, validators, and tests before adding engine builders or any command surface.
guardedDefaults: Keep command surfaces absent until the artifact contract and stable fixtures are proven.
Prefer repo-relative paths and stable examples with no timestamps or local absolute paths.
adoptionChecklist: Add root script coverage before engine/report builders.
Only promote command truth after contract truth is stable.

templates.title: Local operator repo
templates.purpose: Model a bounded local operator with explicit manifests, validation, receipts, and restore-safe behavior.
guardedDefaults: Do not widen into a cloud control plane.
Prefer secret indirection and explicit health/readiness checks over ambient deploy authority.
adoptionChecklist: Define manifest and receipt boundaries first.
Keep backup and restore semantics explicit.
Treat approvals and execution as separate ownership surfaces.

templates.title: Next.js + Supabase app
templates.purpose: Standardize install-first product apps that keep server-side writes, RLS boundaries, and Playbook/Lifeline seams explicit.
requiredSurfaces: server action or API write seam
guardedDefaults: Avoid moving domain truth into Playbook.
Keep monetization, experimentation, and activation contracts explicit before runtime automation.
adoptionChecklist: Declare product truth and protected write seams.
Expose only structural evidence to Playbook unless domain truth belongs in the app.
